scripts.dev:lan: concurrently --raw -n "BACKEND,WEB,MOBILE" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm --prefix frontend run dev:lan"
scripts.dev:tunnel: concurrently --raw -n "BACKEND,WEB,MOBILE" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm --prefix frontend run dev:tunnel"
